caption: A man with a shaved head and a dark beard is seated in a recording studio, wearing a white t-shirt and large black over-ear headphones. He is positioned in front of a professional silver microphone mounted on a black boom arm, which bears the text "rodent voice" and "Rode". The background consists of dark grey, vertically-ribbed acoustic foam panels. Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking, his mouth open as he expresses himself. His gaze shifts slightly, and his facial expression transitions from a neutral look to a more intense, squinted expression. In the final segment, his right arm is raised into the frame, with his hand partially visible and clenched, suggesting an emphatic gesture accompanying his speech. The lighting is consistent and focused on the man's face, highlighting the tattoos on his right arm.
